info.name: Workday Integration Workday Human Capital Management API
Workers
Workday Integration Retrieve a collection of workers

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results

items.docs: Returns a collection of workers and current staffing information. Supports pagination, search, and filtering by various criteria.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a single worker instance

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified worker including personal data, employment information, and organizational assignments.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve direct reports for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the direct reports for the specified worker within their supervisory organization hierarchy.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve history items for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the job history and staffing event history for the specified worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve business title changes for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the history of business title changes for the specified worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Create a business title change

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Initiates a business title change for the specified worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Create a job change for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Initiates a job change event for the specified worker, such as a promotion, transfer, or reassignment.

info.name: Organizations
Workday Integration Retrieve organizations for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the organizational memberships for the specified worker, including supervisory organizations and cost centers.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve supervisory organizations managed by a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the supervisory organizations managed by the specified worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve all supervisory organizations

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results

items.docs: Returns a collection of supervisory organizations within the tenant.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific supervisory organization

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified supervisory organization including its members and hierarchy.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve workers in a supervisory organization

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the workers assigned to the specified supervisory organization.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve all organizations

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results

items.docs: Returns a collection of organizations including company, cost center, and region organizations.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific organization

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve organization types

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns all available organization types in the tenant.

info.name: Reference Data
Workday Integration Retrieve job change reasons

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve currencies

params.name: offset

info.name: Audit
Workday Integration Retrieve audit logs

params.name: limit

params.name: offset
